root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ) as approve_tdate ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as age_mem_text /*อายุการเป็นสมาชิก*/ ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text /*อายุ*/ ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) as tdate_of_birth ,'!adtm_date_1!' as adtm_date
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1 = 1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011001' and '011001' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no asc
